notes: Send all 6 starting villagers to sheep and keep producing villagers nonstop.
Use your Scout to find deer. Rus get bonus gold from hunting animals.
Build a Hunting Cabin near a forest with lots of deer for extra gold income.
Use your Scout to push deer toward the Hunting Cabin or Town Center.
Send 3 villagers to wood and build a Lumber Camp.
Build a House so your population can keep growing.
Keep hunting deer for the gold bonus while gathering food from sheep.
Build a second Scout to keep finding and herding deer.
Continue putting villagers on food and hunting to fuel a fast Feudal Age.
With about 400 food and 200 wood, click up to the Feudal Age.
Pick the Kremlin or High Trade House landmark depending on your plan.
Add villagers to wood while you finish the age-up.
When you reach Feudal Age, build an Archery Range for cheap, strong Rus archers.
Send 4 villagers to gold and build a Mining Camp if you have not already.
Start producing Archers and a few Spearmen to defend against cavalry.
Keep hunting deer with villagers to maintain your gold advantage.
Use your Archers to control the map and protect your hunters.
Research economy upgrades at the Mill and Lumber Camp.
With a healthy economy from hunting, prepare to age up to the Castle Age.
Add a Stable for Horsemen if you want a mix of cavalry and archers.
